description_long: This is a large, ornate double-headed hammer with a cylindrical head featuring intricate geometric patterns and gold trim. The head is predominantly white with gold bands at both ends and a central gold accent, giving it a regal and ceremonial appearance. The handle is straight, wrapped in a reddish-brown grip, and is capped with gold and black decorative elements at both ends. The striking faces of the hammer are flat and circular, each adorned with a bold gold 'X' motif. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and display, possibly for ceremonial or symbolic use in an urban context. The craftsmanship and detailing indicate a high-quality, possibly custom-made tool.
description: A large, ornate double-headed hammer with a white and gold cylindrical head, intricate patterns, and a reddish-brown wrapped handle. The striking faces feature bold gold 'X' motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full double-headed cylindrical hammer with detailed gold and white patterns and the central handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat striking face with a prominent gold 'X' motif and the cylindrical profile of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the opposite side of the double-headed hammer with matching patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the flat striking face with the gold 'X' motif and the cylindrical head profile.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle wrapped in reddish-brown leather, featuring gold and black decorative end caps and a grippy texture.
attribute_head_type: Double-headed cylindrical sledge-type head with flat striking faces, each marked by a gold 'X' motif, and ornate gold and white geometric detailing.
